description: This file defines the main application shell component (`AppShell`) for a note-taking frontend in React. It manages state, persistence, UI layout, and interaction logic for notes, including loading, saving, filtering, editing, and user authentication.

methods.name: formatRelativeTime
methods.description: Formats an ISO timestamp to a human-readable relative time string (e.g., 'just now', '5 min ago').

methods.name: createNote
methods.description: Creates a new empty note and sets it as the selected note.

methods.name: updateSelected
methods.description: Updates the currently selected note with a patch.

methods.name: togglePinned
methods.description: Toggles the 'pinned' status of a note.

methods.name: toggleFavorite
methods.description: Toggles the 'favorite' status of a note.

methods.name: signOut
methods.description: Signs out the current user by clearing session state.
